summary: Tested PVP Critical Fixes - All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed: 1) PVP create mode has NO bot fallback option (correct), 2) Quick-bet preset buttons (100, 500, 1K, 5K, 20K, 50K) work correctly, 3) Auto-Select Best button selects top 5 photos, 4) PVB (Play with Bot) is separate from PVP mode, 5) OpenGamesBrowser displays correctly.

minor.issue: 404 errors for some photo images (likely missing/deleted photos)

action_items: Real two-player WebSocket testing requires manual testing with two devices/browsers - cannot be fully automated
Some photo images return 404 - may need cleanup of orphaned photo references
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PhotoSelector.jsx line 319: is_bot_allowed: false for PVP games - correct implementation
✓ PhotoSelector.jsx line 335: QUICK_BET_PRESETS = [100, 500, 1000, 5000, 20000, 50000] - all 6 presets present
✓ PhotoSelector.jsx line 468-530: PVP Game Settings section shows bet input and quick presets only when mode='create' and 5 photos selected
✓ pvp_game_websocket.py line 89: round_winner_determined flag initialized to False
✓ pvp_game_websocket.py line 568: handle_tap checks round_winner_determined before processing
✓ pvp_game_websocket.py line 952-956: submit_round_result checks and sets round_winner_determined to prevent duplicates
✓ game_routes.py line 1973-2007: /pvp/finish-round endpoint has IDEMPOTENT check - returns cached result if already finished
✓ PVP and PVB modes are correctly separated - 'Play with Bot' is a distinct option from PVP open games
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP critical fixes verified: 1) No bot fallback in PVP mode (is_bot_allowed=false), 2) Quick-bet presets working (100, 500, 1K, 5K, 20K, 50K), 3) Auto-Select Best working, 4) Double-win prevention via round_winner_determined flag, 5) Atomic round outcomes via idempotent /pvp/finish-round endpoint. PVB (Play with Bot) remains separate and unchanged.

features_verified.pvp_no_bot_fallback: VERIFIED - PhotoSelector for PVP create mode sets is_bot_allowed: false
features_verified.quick_bet_presets: VERIFIED - All 6 presets (100, 500, 1K, 5K, 20K, 50K) visible and clickable
features_verified.auto_select_best: VERIFIED - Button selects top 5 photos by dollar value with stamina >= 1
features_verified.open_games_browser: VERIFIED - Component loads correctly with search and game cards
features_verified.double_win_prevention: VERIFIED - round_winner_determined flag prevents duplicate submissions
features_verified.pvb_separate: VERIFIED - 'Play with Bot' is a separate option from PVP open games

note: All requested PVP fixes have been verified. The key changes are correctly implemented: PVP is strictly player-vs-player (no bot fallback), double-win bug is prevented via round_winner_determined flag, and atomic round outcomes are ensured via idempotent finish-round endpoint. PVB (Player vs Bot) mode remains completely intact and separate.
